# Appendix

## Reference tables to add

- Code lists for controlled vocabularies (estimate type, enhancement level,
  verification status, aggregation flags, benchmark basis).
- Column dictionary for core tables (CU series, site lookup, metadata, metric
  specs).
- Glossary of terms and abbreviations.
- Mapping of code lists to ontology IRIs where available (stable identifiers
  for reuse across datasets).

## Case study summaries

- Condensed summaries of species/area precedents with links back to the source
  reports for detail.

## External resources

- Links to the DFO Salmon Ontology site for terminology.
- Links to canonical code repositories (e.g., WSP-Metrics-Pkg) for metrics and
  plotting.
- Links to validation/packaging tools (e.g., Salmon Data Package specs) for
  automated checks.
